# Ripple v6 -- top-level RUNTIME dependencies (the whole repo)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# One file to make `python -m connect all` and `python onboard.py` run on a
# clean clone. Generated by scanning every first-party import in connect/,
# library-onboarding/, scripts/, portal_recon/. Versions are PINNED (==) to the
# exact build verified working on this machine (probed via importlib.metadata
# on 2026-06-27, Python 3.9).
#
# Bootstrap (one command):
#   python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
#
# Test-only deps (pytest, rapidfuzz) live in requirements-dev.txt:
#   pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

# --- LLM + HTTP ------------------------------------------------------------
anthropic==0.100.0            # Claude API client (recon, script-gen, dbt-gen)
requests==2.32.5              # bulk CSV/ZIP fetch + REST scouting
httpx==0.28.1                 # async-capable HTTP client (paginated REST sources)
tenacity==9.0.0               # retry/backoff for LLM + API calls (llm.py)
                             #   NOTE: not installed locally; pinned to a recent
                             #   known-good release. Bump to the resolved version
                             #   after first `pip install` if you want exact lock.

# --- Data + Snowflake ------------------------------------------------------
pandas==2.3.3                                  # parse + frame every source
snowflake-connector-python[pandas]==4.4.0      # load to LANDING, read catalog;
                                               #   [pandas] extra pulls write_pandas
pyarrow==21.0.0                                # required by the [pandas] extra /
                                               #   write_pandas; pinned explicitly

# --- HTML parsing / scrape sources -----------------------------------------
beautifulsoup4==4.14.3        # static-page scrape (recon.py, browser.py)
lxml==5.3.0                   # parser backend for bs4 + pandas.read_html

# --- Visualization (the connect graph + dashboards) ------------------------
plotly==6.6.0                # connection_explorer.html, build_dashboard.py
                             #   THIS is the dep that was missing and crashed
                             #   `python -m connect all` on a clean clone.

# --- CLI / config ----------------------------------------------------------
rich==13.9.4                 # checkpoint UI (checkpoint.py)
                             #   NOTE: not installed locally; pinned to a recent
                             #   known-good release (see tenacity note above).
python-dotenv==1.0.1         # loads library-onboarding/.env
pyyaml==6.0.3                # YAML I/O for dbt scaffolding / config

# --- Optional: headless-browser scrape (access_pattern=scrape_js only) ------
# Heavy (~170 MB browser binary, installed separately via `playwright install
# chromium`). Imported lazily in browser.py; the repo runs fine without it until
# a source actually needs JS rendering. Uncomment to enable.
# playwright==1.49.1          # not installed locally; pinned to a recent known-good

# --- dbt (runs/tests the 73 models in library-onboarding/ripple_dbt) --------
# NOT installed on this machine, so not == to a probed version. Pinned to a
# recent known-good release; required to `dbt run` / `dbt test` the staging +
# mart models. Bump together with dbt-core if you upgrade.
dbt-snowflake==1.8.4
